nasb.text: They blessed Rebekah and said to her, “May you, our sister, Become thousands of ten thousands, And may your descendants possess The gate of those who hate them.”

esv.text: And they blessed Rebekah and said to her, “Our sister, may you become thousands of ten thousands, and may your offspring possess the gate of those who hate him!”

cnv.text: 他們給利百加祝福，對她說： “我們的妹妹啊， 願你作千萬人之母； 願你的後裔， 佔領仇敵的城門。”

ccb.text: 并为利百加祝福，说： “我们的妹妹啊， 愿你成为千万人之母！ 愿你的后代战胜仇敌！”

csbs.text: 他们祝福莉白加，对她说： “我们的妹妹啊， 愿你成为千万人的母亲， 愿你的后裔占有仇敌的城门！”
